title: Concept Design
content:
We develop a preliminary design that translates your vision into a tangible landscape concept.

Our approach includes:

- Detailed sketches capturing design intent
- Digital renderings illustrating layout and spatial relationships
- Exploration of design possibilities and aesthetic directions

**Aims and Purposes:**

- Create an initial conceptual site plan
- Establish foundational design elements
- Develop multiple design options
- Provide preliminary budget range for different design scenarios

**Drawings and Documents Provided:**

- Comprehensive preliminary conceptual site plan, including:
  - Location of proposed site elements
  - Retention of significant existing features
  - Conceptual placement of: Pergolas, Walkways, Water features, Pool, etc.
  - General planting areas
- Detailed final scaled master plan showing:
  - Precise landscape feature placement
  - Comprehensive plant positioning
- Extensive material specification list, including: Detailed plant inventory, Paving options, Pool cladding materials, etc.
- Visualisation documents: 3D design renderings or Hand-drawn conceptual illustrations
